records.title: HighPlains Electric launches substation and feeder upgrade program for large-load customer growth
records.subheadline: Utility cites data center and industrial interconnection demand.
records.body_text: HighPlains Electric announced a multi-year substation and feeder upgrade program tied to large-load customer growth and interconnection demand. The utility said the program responds to expected data center and industrial load additions and will require new power-system investments across its service territory.

records.title: Prairie Grid Utility signs electric service agreement with large-load campus project
records.subheadline: Agreement is expected to trigger new substation and transmission work.
records.body_text: Prairie Grid Utility announced an electric service agreement with a large-load campus project that is expected to increase connected load materially. The utility said the project will trigger new substation, feeder, and transmission work as part of its power-system expansion plan.

records.title: NorthRiver Digital Infrastructure breaks ground on second hyperscale data center campus phase
records.subheadline: New phase adds power-delivery, cooling and shell capacity.
records.body_text: NorthRiver Digital Infrastructure announced groundbreaking for the second phase of its hyperscale data center campus. The company said the project adds new shell space, cooling infrastructure, and power-delivery systems as it expands campus capacity.

records.title: Summit Compute Parks advances 250MW data center campus construction
records.subheadline: Project includes dedicated substations and on-site power infrastructure.
records.body_text: Summit Compute Parks announced continued construction of a 250MW data center campus. The company said the project includes dedicated substations, on-site power infrastructure, and supporting cooling systems to bring new campus capacity online.

records.title: PeakSpan Power Systems expands generator module assembly for utility and data center demand
records.subheadline: Expansion is aimed at fast-response power projects and backup systems.
records.body_text: PeakSpan Power Systems announced an expansion of its generator module assembly operations to serve utility response projects and data center backup-power demand. The company said the expansion increases package throughput for gas and dual-fuel generator systems.

records.title: FlexGen Turbine Packages invests in new manufacturing line for fast-start power equipment
records.subheadline: Project supports utility balancing needs and digital infrastructure resilience.
records.body_text: FlexGen Turbine Packages announced an investment in a new manufacturing line for fast-start power equipment and associated balance-of-plant systems. The company said the line will support utility balancing needs and resilience demand from digital infrastructure operators.
